findings.quote: en självförsörjande gård förväntades dra sitt eget
findings.note: class 6: 'dra sitt eget' reads as an elided 'dra sitt (eget) lass'; standing alone the object-less idiom is unidiomatic/incomplete. native alternative: 'dra sitt eget lass' or 'klara sig själv'

class 6: 'blöta ner' is transitive (regnet blöter ner marken); with 'marken' as an intransitive subject it is off-valence — the ground gets wet, it does not itself 'wet down'. native alternative: 'när marken blir blöt' / 'när underlaget blöts upp'
